title: Farmer's Dream
description: Farmer's Dream is a modpack focused on farming and building, featuring new biomes to explore, a relaxing experience where you can make a coffee, sit back and chill.
body:
Farmer's Dream is a curated modpack designed to deliver the harmony of agriculture, cozy home-building and high immersion!

Focuses on building and farming, offering a soothing experience with an immense world to explore and hundreds of new biomes. It’s perfect for those looking for a relaxing modpack to play at their own pace

A living world with rich new ambient sounds and a soothing soundtrack, lot of new places to look for and With breathtaking landscapes thanks to the config terralith+tectonic+geophilic combined with Farmer's delight, that will make you hesitate on where to lay your foundation and new animals companions to share your fields, you will also find new mineral tiers for make a even better progresion with tools and weapons!

It's also comes with build-in Shaders! "Complementary Shaders-Reimagined" you can enable or disable wherever you want, in the menu > options > graphics > shaders, toggle shaders on or off or with the K key in game.

You can play with your friends since it is multiplayer compatible. They just need to download the modpack and one need to be the host, it comes with the Essentials mod, also you will have voice in game chat to communicate with your friends and a pretty immersive one, that will get affected by the distance or de echo in the caves while mining.

Farmer's Dream is a medium-content-modpack, you need to allocate more ram before launching the game:

Minimum RAM: 6 GB (6.144 MB).

Recommended RAM: 8GB (8.192 MB) for optimal performance.

Add this mem settings in the modrinth app > instance settings > configuration > java and memory > custom memory selection.

Shaders are on by default, to active, go to options, graphics and look for oculus and shaders, then select the shaders and togle apply.

I'm also planning to add quests in a future update of the modpack.

Don't forget to tell me if you want me to add any mod you like to be in the modpack!
